allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\gurur\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\My Projects\\TISP-Nexus" -Recurse -Directory | Where-Object {$_.Name -match "^\(scripts|docs|Project 1|scratch\)" } | Select-Object FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\gurur\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\My Projects\\TISP-Nexus\\submission-evidence" -Recurse -File | Select-Object FullName | ForEach-Object {$_.FullName.Replace\("C:\\Users\\gurur\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\My Projects\\TISP-Nexus\\", ""\)} | Sort-Object)
PowerShell(Start-Process "C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe"; Write-Output "Docker Desktop launch attempted")
PowerShell(Start-Process "C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Docker Desktop launch initiated")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 15; $result = try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5173" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 } catch { $null }; if \($result\) { "Dev server ready: $\($result.StatusCode\)" } else { "Still not ready" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\gurur\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\My Projects\\TISP-Nexus\\FINAL_SUBMISSION" -Recurse | Sort-Object DirectoryName, Name | Format-Table Name, @{Name="KB";Expression={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,0\)}}, DirectoryName -AutoSize)

PowerShell($mispResp = try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://localhost:4443" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 12 -SkipCertificateCheck } catch { $null }; if \($mispResp\) { "MISP LIVE: HTTP $\($mispResp.StatusCode\)" } else { "Still loading..." })

PowerShell($started = Get-Date; do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; $log = docker logs tisp-infra-opencti-1 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3; $ready = $log | Select-String "initialization done|Listening on" -SimpleMatch; Write-Host "$\(Get-Date -Format 'HH:mm:ss'\) — $\($log[-1]\)"; if \(\(Get-Date\) - $started -gt [timespan]::FromMinutes\(3\)\) { Write-Host "Timeout"; break } } while \(-not $ready\); Write-Host "OpenCTI ready: $\([bool]$ready\)")

PowerShell($r = try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20 } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; if \($r.StatusCode\) { "OpenCTI HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) — $\(\($r.Content\).Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(100,$r.Content.Length\)\)\)" } else { $r })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) — OpenCTI reachable" } catch { "Not yet: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\gurur\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\My Projects\\TISP-Nexus\\FINAL_SUBMISSION\\final-screenshots\\" | Select-Object Name, @{n='KB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)}}, LastWriteTime | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending)

PowerShell($bundle = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\gurur\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\My Projects\\TISP-Nexus\\tisp-tools\\out\\stix-bundle.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; "Objects: $\($bundle.objects.Count\)"; $report = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\gurur\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\My Projects\\TISP-Nexus\\tisp-tools\\out\\threat-report.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; "IOC count: $\($report.summary.indicatorCount\), Sources: $\($report.summary.sourceCount\)")
